title: Suggest FORWARD: acknowledge and close stale cross-system forwards
desc: WkAutoQuant and other systems may FORWARD observation notes to WKAppBot suggest backlog. These are informational bridges, not bugs. Acknowledge once, then resolve as acknowledged if no code action needed.
steps: When a suggest has type FORWARD with no actionable code change, resolve it as 'acknowledged' with a note explaining why no fix is needed.
Check if the forwarded observation is covered by an existing skill or already handled in code. If yes, reference the skill in the resolve note.
If the forwarded item reveals an actual bug, file a new suggest with proper BUG type and keep the FORWARD resolved separately.
author: claude
